hero.name: Suraj Kumar
hero.subtitle: Building scalable, high-performance web applications with Laravel, React.js, Node.js, and modern web technologies.
hero.description: Experienced Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of expertise in designing and developing secure, scalable, and user-centric web applications. Skilled in PHP, Laravel, React.js, Node.js, MySQL, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, and modern JavaScript frameworks. Passionate about solving complex problems and delivering high-quality digital solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer with over 5 years of professional experience in designing, developing, and deploying scalable web applications. My expertise spans Laravel, PHP, React.js, Node.js, MySQL, PostgreSQL, RESTful APIs, and modern JavaScript technologies. I enjoy solving complex business challenges by building secure, efficient, and user-focused digital solutions.
about.objective: To contribute to innovative organizations by developing high-quality, scalable, and performance-driven web applications while continuously learning emerging technologies and delivering exceptional user experiences.

services.title: Custom Web Development
services.description: Building secure, scalable, and high-performance web applications tailored to business requirements using modern technologies.

services.title: Frontend Development
services.description: Developing responsive, SEO-friendly, and interactive user interfaces with React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Bootstrap, and Tailwind CSS.

services.title: Backend Development
services.description: Creating robust backend systems, REST APIs, authentication, and business logic using Laravel, PHP, Node.js, and Express.js.

services.title: REST API Development & Integration
services.description: Developing and integrating REST APIs, third-party services, payment gateways, social login, and external business platforms.

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.description: Developing high-performance cross-platform Android and iOS applications using React Native with seamless backend integration.

services.title: AI Integration & Automation
services.description: Integrating AI-powered solutions including OpenAI, ChatGPT, Gemini, AI chatbots, workflow automation, and intelligent business applications.

services.title: DevOps & CI/CD
services.description: Implementing CI/CD pipelines, Docker containerization, Git workflows, automated deployments, monitoring, and production infrastructure.

services.title: VPS & Cloud Server Management
services.description: Setting up and managing Linux VPS servers, Ubuntu, Apache, Nginx, SSL, SSH, Firewall, backups, and server optimization.

services.title: Web Hosting & Deployment
services.description: Deploying and managing applications using cPanel, HestiaCP, Plesk, Cloudflare, DNS, domains, email services, and production hosting.

services.title: Database Architecture
services.description: Designing, optimizing, and maintaining scalable MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis databases for enterprise applications.

services.title: Performance & Security Optimization
services.description: Improving application speed, Core Web Vitals, SEO, caching, server security, vulnerability fixes, and overall system performance.

services.title: Maintenance & Technical Support
services.description: Providing ongoing maintenance, monitoring, bug fixing, upgrades, feature enhancements, and long-term technical support.

experience.description: Working as a Full Stack Developer, delivering enterprise-grade web applications, RESTful APIs, AI-powered solutions, and scalable software systems. Responsible for the complete software development lifecycle, from requirement analysis and architecture design to deployment and production support.
responsibilities: Developed enterprise web applications using Laravel, React.js, Next.js, Node.js, and PHP.
Designed and implemented scalable REST APIs and third-party integrations.
Built AI-powered applications using OpenAI, Gemini, and automation workflows.
Developed cross-platform mobile applications using React Native.
Managed Linux VPS servers, cPanel, HestiaCP, Apache, Nginx, SSL, DNS, and Cloudflare.
Implemented Docker-based deployments and CI/CD workflows.
Optimized MySQL, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB databases for high performance.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable software solutions.
Maintained production applications and resolved critical issues with minimal downtime.

experience.description: Started my professional software development career by building business websites, web applications, and backend systems for clients. Worked closely with senior developers while gaining hands-on experience in full-stack web development, database design, and deployment.
responsibilities: Developed responsive websites and business applications using PHP and Laravel.
Created frontend interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and jQuery.
Worked with MySQL database design and optimization.
Maintained existing applications and fixed production issues.
Participated in application deployment and hosting management.
Used Git for version control and team collaboration.
Worked directly with clients to understand project requirements.

education.university: Board of Technical Education, Uttar Pradesh
education.description: Built a strong foundation in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Database Management Systems, Data Structures, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, and Web Development. Completed multiple academic and practical projects focused on modern software development.
Completed Higher Secondary education with a focus on Science and Mathematics, building a strong analytical and technical foundation.
Completed secondary education with excellent academic performance and developed a strong interest in technology and programming.

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.review: Suraj delivered our web application with exceptional quality and performance. His expertise in Laravel and React.js made the entire development process smooth and efficient.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.review: An outstanding Full Stack Developer with excellent communication skills. Every milestone was delivered on time and exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.name: Emily Rodriguez
testimonials.review: Suraj built a scalable and secure platform for our business. His problem-solving skills and attention to detail are truly impressive.

testimonials.name: David Wilson
testimonials.review: From API development to server deployment, Suraj handled everything professionally. I highly recommend him for complex web projects.

testimonials.name: Sophia Martinez
testimonials.review: Working with Suraj was a fantastic experience. He transformed our ideas into a modern, high-performing application with an excellent user experience.

testimonials.name: James Anderson
testimonials.review: Highly skilled in Laravel, React.js, VPS management, and DevOps. Suraj consistently delivers clean, maintainable, and production-ready code.
